metadata.description: Jack's custom agent skills for Claude

plugins.name: data-modeler
plugins.description: Interactive data modeling skill for relational databases. Walks through requirements, schema analysis, normalization, review, ERD preview, and migration generation.

plugins.name: voice-writer
plugins.description: Writes in a personalized voice and style. Drafts messages, proposals, announcements, articles, and other text matching the author's tone, vocabulary, and formatting preferences. Includes banned phrase enforcement, content type routing, and self-review critic loop.

plugins.name: test-writer
plugins.description: Writes tests for JavaScript and TypeScript code across frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Node test runner, Playwright, Storybook). Follows behavior-driven testing principles: tests user behavior not implementation details, uses Testing Library query priority, mocks at the network level with MSW, and writes flat self-contained tests.

plugins.name: graphql-schema-designer
plugins.description: Opinionated GraphQL schema design, review, and evolution. Designs schemas with domain mutations over CRUD, payload unions for error handling, custom scalars, and state machine unions. Supports SDL files, code-first frameworks (Pothos, Nexus, TypeGraphQL, gqlgen, Strawberry, graphql-ruby, Hot Chocolate, Juniper), and federation.

plugins.name: graphite
plugins.description: Stacked PR workflow using the Graphite CLI (gt). Creates, manages, and submits stacked pull requests — breaking features into small, reviewable increments under ~200 lines each. Supports Graphite MCP server for AI-native stacking, stack planning, and per-PR implementation. Triggers on: stacked PRs, gt commands, splitting large changes, syncing branches, or any mention of Graphite.
